title: GCP Batch Tile Task Manifest
description: Schema for a single-tile GCP Batch task manifest. One tile = one task. No wildcard tile selection, no city-wide execution by default, no mutable execution identity.

schema_version.description: Pinned schema version. Must be this exact value.

run_id.description: Unique, stable run identifier. Used in output_prefix and reducer. Must not be 'latest', 'current', or any other mutable alias.

tile_id.description: Single tile identifier. This field is a string — array or wildcard values are not permitted. Each task manifest governs exactly one tile.

tile_scope.description: Explicit single-tile scope assertion. Must match tile_id. Tasks must never process more than one tile.

explicit_single_tile.description: Must be true. Asserts that this manifest governs exactly one tile.

tile_id_confirmation.description: Must equal the top-level tile_id field exactly.

city_wide_execution.description: Must be false. City-wide execution is not permitted from a per-tile task manifest.

input_object_uri.description: gs:// URI for the immutable, content-addressed input LAZ file. Must end in .laz or .las. Must not be 'latest.laz' or any mutable alias.

input_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the input object at input_object_uri. Must be verified before processing begins. No missing or placeholder hashes permitted.

source_contract_uri.description: URI or identifier of the authoritative LAZ source contract document. Must be immutable and content-addressed. References the contract defining CRS, units, Z factor, and normalization stage order.

source_contract_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the source contract document, prefixed with 'sha256:'. Must match the contract content at source_contract_uri.

repository_commit_sha.description: Full 40-character git commit SHA of the repository state that produced this task. Links output to exact pipeline code.

container_image_digest.description: Content-addressable digest of the container image used for execution, prefixed with 'sha256:'. Human-readable tags alone are not accepted as execution identity. The container entrypoint must verify this digest at startup.

container_image_ref.description: Optional human-readable image reference (tag form). Not used as execution identity. The container_image_digest field is the authoritative execution identity.

output_prefix.description: gs:// prefix for all outputs from this task. Must include run_id and tile_id path components. Must end with '/'. Must not be a bucket root. The task may only write beneath this prefix.

execution_mode.description: Controls what the entrypoint actually does. NO_OP: emits a synthetic result manifest, does no processing. DRY_RUN: validates all inputs and contracts without invoking PDAL. REAL_DATA_CONTROLLED: requires independent authorization review before use.

real_data_execution_enabled.description: Compile-time execution lock mirroring REAL_DATA_EXECUTION_ENABLED in run_tile_miami.py. Must be false for NO_OP and DRY_RUN modes. Setting to true requires independent review and is not authorized by default.

attempt_number.description: Current attempt number for this task (1-indexed). Combined with run_id and tile_id to form an attempt-specific output path.

max_attempts.description: Maximum number of attempts permitted for this task. Capped at 3 for the initial benchmark.

expected_processed_crs.description: CRS expected for all processed outputs. For Miami: EPSG:32617 (WGS 84 / UTM Zone 17N).

expected_processed_units.description: Units expected for all processed metric outputs.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this manifest was created.

source_contract_fields.description: Embedded copy of key source contract fields for inline verification without fetching the contract URI. Values must match source_contract_digest content.

labels.description: GCP resource labels applied to this task and its Batch job for cost attribution and filtering.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes. Does not affect execution.

allOf.description: NO_OP mode: real_data_execution_enabled must be false.
DRY_RUN mode: real_data_execution_enabled must be false.
